column1: # Kinematic chain for the MX850 — 5-axis mill, trunnion-table layout.
# 15-column format (trailing obj_file column). Two chains branch off the
# upper base: the table slide stack (X -> B -> C) and the spindle stack
#   DOC3184A -> B            (Rotary, swinging support for the rotary table)
#   DOC3186A -> C            (Rotary, the rotating table itself)
#   DOC1234B -> Z            (Linear, spindle Z ram, carried by Y)
# motion_axis mapping (matches kernel): X=0, Y=1, Z=2, B=3, C=4.
# obj_file column holds the plain basename — the machine files live flat
# alongside this TSV in machines/, and on the SD card they land flat at
# `system/machine/MX850-DOC1227B.STL` and hits the VFS cache directly.
# STL vertices are already in machine frame so offsets are zero — tweak
# only if you need to shift a whole sub-chain.
